expectations.text: Does NOT create an onboarding plan
expectations.evidence: Output is titled 'Offboard Skill — Request Declined'. States: 'Your request is for onboarding a new developer...This falls outside the scope of the offboard skill.' No onboarding plan generated.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for onboarding
expectations.evidence: States: 'Use the /onboard skill (or equivalent onboarding skill in your HR operations plugin)' and lists specific capabilities: first week schedules, equipment setup, introduction plans, orientation programme design, probation milestones.

expectations.text: Does NOT confuse onboarding with offboarding
expectations.evidence: Summary table explicitly distinguishes: 'Offboard is scoped to departing employees only'. Quotes the skill description: 'NOT for: onboarding plans (use onboarding)'.
